title: Maharashtra Magic
shortDescription: Bustling city life, hill stations, and historical forts.
overview: Experience the fast-paced life of Mumbai, the lush green hills of Lonavala, and the cultural richness of Pune in this 5-day tour.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Mumbai
itinerary.description: Visit Gateway of India and Marine Drive.

itinerary.title: Elephanta Caves
itinerary.description: Ferry ride to Elephanta caves, evening shopping.

itinerary.title: Drive to Lonavala
itinerary.description: Visit Karla Caves and Tiger Point.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pune
itinerary.description: Visit Aga Khan Palace and Shaniwar Wada.
